hero.title: Your Organization's
hero.description: OpenComp helps European organizations achieve true digital sovereignty. We build systems that remain understandable, auditable and operable over time - even as vendors, regulations and geopolitical conditions change.

providers.title: Digital sovereignty,
providers.subtitle: step by step
providers.description: OpenComp builds practical, open solutions that help organisations regain control over communication, collaboration, and infrastructure.

compass.title: What's Next
compass.description: Morpheus is the first step. OpenComp is building a broader digital sovereignty roadmap around open social media, cloud collaboration, and transparent long-term partnerships.

polaris.title: Morpheus 🛠️ under construction
polaris.description: Morpheus will help organisations migrate from closed tools like MS Teams and Zoom to Matrix, with fully managed hosting, straightforward administration, and reliable backups.

items.oss: Open-source first: we contribute upstream and keep our work auditable
items.mastodon: Decentralized social infrastructure, including managed Mastodon deployments
items.opencloud: Sovereign file collaboration with OpenCloud / Nextcloud-style services
items.transparency: Transparent operations and customer communication at every step

items.switch: Switch from MS Teams and Zoom to the open Matrix protocol
items.hosting: Choose your own server or hosting provider

features.title: Values of
features.subtitle: OpenComp
features.description: Built with core values of sovereignty, privacy, and control

privacy.title: Data Sovereignty
privacy.description: Your data stays under your control. No third parties can access your communications without your explicit permission.

bestOfBoth.title: Open Standards First
bestOfBoth.description: We prioritize open protocols like Matrix so your communication stack stays portable and future-proof.

ownership.title: Vendor Independence
ownership.description: Build systems that remain operable even as vendors change terms, raise prices, or leave markets.

openSource.title: Full Transparency
openSource.description: Open-source components and clear architecture let you verify security and privacy claims.

customizable.title: Managed, Not Locked
customizable.description: Get the convenience of managed services while keeping the freedom to adapt and evolve your stack.

authentication.title: Identity Integration
authentication.description: Connect with your existing identity provider - Microsoft Entra, Google Workspace, SAML, or your own directory.

documents.title: Backups & Recovery
documents.description: Automated backups and recovery-ready operations are built into Morpheus from day one.

characters.title: Transparent Partnership
characters.description: We work openly with customers, explain trade-offs clearly, and build trust through visibility.

contact.title: Get In
contact.subtitle: Touch
contact.description: Interested in digital sovereignty for your organization? Reach out through any of these channels.

footer.description: Helping European organizations achieve digital sovereignty through open, auditable, and controllable systems.
